title: Yale - Y112/30/121/1 Iron Disc Padlock 30mm - Nickel Plated - Hardened Steel Shackle - Extreme Corrosion Resistance for Outdoor use
features: SUITABLE FOR OUTDOOR USAGE: Suitable for a garden shed, gates, shutter doors or any other outdoor high value items you want to keep safe and secure.
DESIGNED WITH YOU IN MIND: Available in different sizes and standard and long shackle to suit your needs.
SECURE YOUR BELONGINGS: The disc type locking mechanism makes the padlock harder to pick and the hardened steel shackle prevents from cutting, so you can enjoy your life with peace of mind.

RIGOROUSLY TESTED: Tested to EN12320:2012 simulating forms of attack such as cutting, pulling and twisting of shackle, 10,000 opening and closing cycles and 240 hours for corrosion resistance to ensure protection against weather conditions with a CEN rating of 2.
DIMENSIONS:Body Width: 30mm, Body Height: 26mm, Body Depth: 15mmShackle Ø: 4.9, Vertical Shackle Clearance: 21mm, Horizontal Shackle Clearance: 15mm, Weight: 90.4g
description: From the manufacturer Technical Specification Level of security: Standard Locking mechanism: Disc type Locking points: Double locking Body material: Iron Body finish: Nickel Plated Shackle material: Hardened Steel Keys: 3 With over 180 years of manufacturing expertise, the Yale Disc Iron Padlocks have been built with you in mind. Yale takes care of your possessions; you take care of the rest. Available in different sizes and standard and long shackle, our Disc Iron Padlock is suitable for a garden shed, gates, shutter doors or any other outdoor high value items you want to keep safe and secure. Disc type locking mechanism makes it harder to pick Hardened steel shackle prevents cutting.
